title: javier's Glowing 3D Ores
description: 3D and emissive models for the ores but without optifine
body:
EN: change the textures to shiny ones and also add a 3D model to the minerals :D
ES: cambia las texturas por unas que brillan y ademas añade un modelo 3d a los minerales



ALSO SEE javier's minecraft look Minecraft Texture Pack

![ores](https://i.imgur.com/GnvHBIR.png)
